title: What’s coming to our GitHub Actions 2026 security roadmap
content: GitHub is rolling out a 2026 security roadmap to harden its Actions platform against supply‑chain attacks. Key upgrades include deterministic dependency locking, immutable releases, and policy‑driven workflow execution that centralises permissions and event triggers. Secrets will become scoped to specific contexts, removing implicit inheritance, while new role‑based permissions will enforce least privilege. CI/CD runners will gain real‑time telemetry via the Actions Data Stream and a native egress firewall for network control. These changes aim to make Actions secure‑by‑default, auditable, and observably protected.

title: A year of open source vulnerability trends: CVEs, advisories, and malware
content: GitHub reviewed 4,101 open‑source advisories in 2025, the fewest since 2021, but new advisories rose 19% compared to 2024. Vulnerabilities were distributed largely like the database, with Go slightly overrepresented. Cross‑site scripting (CWE‑79) remained most common, while resource exhaustion, deserialization, and server‑side request forgery increased. Malware advisories spiked 69% (7,197 total). GitHub’s CNA issued 2,903 CVEs, a 35% rise, with 679 new organizations requesting IDs. Efforts to improve categorization and community contributions grew, aiming to enhance security in 2026.

title: Optimizing a Lock-Free Ring Buffer

The focus is on helping developers build high‑performance, thread‑safe circular queues.

This intense arms race in AI infrastructure reveals significant financial risks behind the burgeoning market.

title: Apifox 自己文件服务被入侵了，为什么说遭供应链攻击？还是理解有问题？
content: Apifox’s file‑hosting service was compromised when the JS file `apifox-app-event-tracking.min.js` was tampered with to load malicious code from apifox.it.com. The file is served from a CDN hosted on Qiniu Cloud, which has been breached. Since the attack involved internal files and the CDN itself, not merely a third‑party library injection, the incident should be classified as a direct breach rather than a supply‑chain attack. The explanation given by Apifox is confusing and possibly misleading.

title: 使用 OpenClaw 一个月，让他自己写了一篇总结（重新排版）
content: In early 2024, the author deployed OpenClaw on a cloud server to build an autonomous AI assistant called “军师” using GLM‑5‑turbo. Over a month, they set up memory layers, integrated browser automation, search, and Feishu bot, and automated daily tasks such as blogging, stock queries, and e‑commerce plans. They refined the system prompt to 21 K tokens, achieved 99 % cache hit, and saved on token costs. The assistant runs 24/7, manages to‑do lists, books web searches, and writes code, all while keeping data on their own server.

title: 大型 Python 开源项目都不会对变量进行类型注解？

While AI models often recommend adding type annotations, examining open-source code shows that few, if any, major projects actually use them for variables. This observation highlights a gap between best-practice advice and real-world coding practices.

title: GNOME 基金会推出奖学金计划
content: The GNOME Foundation has launched a fellowship program to fund community members who work on the long‑term sustainability of GNOME. Starting in May, the 12‑month awards will provide $70,000 to $100,000 to individual and community contributors, subject to U.S. policy restrictions. Funding will cover infrastructure, CI/CD, testing, documentation, accessibility and debt reduction—not new features. The fellowship aims to reduce administrative burdens and enable contributors to focus on critical, often underfunded, foundational work. Continued donor support will sustain the program.

content: OpenAI is shutting down its video‑generation app Sora to refocus on programming and other business areas ahead of its planned Q4 IPO. All consumer-facing Sora features, developer APIs, and related ChatGPT functions will be discontinued, as confirmed by the company’s farewell announcement.

title: 快手：Q4 营收、调整后净利均超预期
content: Kuaishou’s fourth‑quarter revenue reached 39.57 billion yuan, up 11.8% year‑over‑year and above the 38.86 billion yuan forecast. Adjusted net profit was 5.46 billion yuan, a 16.2% increase and higher than the 5.38 billion yuan estimate.

title: 拼多多：2025 年第四季度营收 1239.12 亿元，同比增长 12%
content: Pinduoduo reported Q4 2025 revenue of 123.9 billion yuan, up 12% year-on-year, while parent‑company net profit fell 11% to 24.5 billion yuan. For the full year 2025, revenue reached 431.8 billion yuan, a 10% increase, but parent net profit declined 12% to 99.4 billion yuan.

title: 火山引擎云端大模型日均调用量破百万亿 Tokens，跻身全球前三
content: ByteDance’s cloud platform, VolcEngine, surpassed 100 trillion tokens per day in cloud‑model calls since the 2026 Lunar New Year, exceeding 60% growth in under two months. It has become one of only three companies worldwide with daily token usage above this threshold. Most consumption is from China, while overseas operations are still early and growing. The new video‑generation model, Seedance 2.0, isn’t yet available abroad, but its release could further boost global usage.

title: OpenAI 本周将升级 ChatGPT，实现 AI 直接比价与一键购物
content: OpenAI announced on March 24 that a new “Agent Commerce Agreement” will roll out this week, letting all ChatGPT users compare prices and buy products directly within the chat. E‑commerce sites can integrate their inventory through an API, and ChatGPT will suggest items from real‑time data, enabling one‑click purchasing without leaving the conversation. The move is seen as opening a new, equally accessible channel for merchants and could reshape SEO and shopping experiences in the tech sector.

title: 泡泡玛特 2025 营收 371.2 亿元 全球四大区域均实现三位数增长
content: BubbleMart International Group announced its 2025 financial results: revenue reached 37.12 billion yuan, up 184.7% YoY, and adjusted net profit was 13.08 billion yuan, up 284.5% YoY. The Labubu family generated 14.16 billion yuan, while China’s revenue hit 20.85 billion yuan, up 134.6% YoY. Profits in APAC, Americas, Europe, and Other grew 157.6%, 748.4%, and 506.3% respectively, achieving triple‑digit gains in all four global regions.

title: 当世界重新开始修建工厂 | 原文
content: For a long time investors chased light, high‑turnover assets with strong imagination—businesses that could expand without heavy capital. Recent shifts show “halo” assets gaining traction: they are not lightweight or glamorous, but when the world faces supply limits, industrial security needs, and a focus on rebuilding infrastructure, these tangible, capital‑intensive industries become more valuable. Europe’s reindustrialization and the new industrialization in resource‑rich southern regions now drive global investment trends.

title: 让内存股血流成河的“Google突破性算法”，是又一个离谱大乌龙 | 原文
content: A Korean tech‑stock crash, largely driven by a flash of bad news about memory‐chip demand, was triggered when Google Research published a blog claiming its new TurboQuant compression algorithm could drastically cut AI KV‑cache storage needs. The resulting worries caused SK Hynix and Samsung to plummet, as well as US memory firms Micron, SanDisk, and Lam Research. The post was later criticized as a misleading hype that sparked an unnecessary market sell‑off.

title: 苹果 App Store 被海量“垃圾 AI 应用”冲击，导致审核周期延长
content: Apple’s App Store faces a surge of low‑quality “AI junk” apps that overwhelm its review process, extending typical review times from 24‑48 hours to up to 45 days. The influx increases the workload for human reviewers, causing many legitimate submissions to be delayed and developers to miss launch windows. Critics argue these apps degrade the marketplace and suggest fee‑based or priority review mechanisms, but Apple has yet to respond with corrective measures.

content: NocoBase released several scoped updates in March 2026. These changes focus on stability, AI integration, and workflow performance.

title: Google 发了个压缩算法，内存砍 6 倍，速度快 8 倍，精度零损失 | 原文
content: Google has released TurboQuant, a compression algorithm for large‑model KV caches that reduces memory usage by six times and speeds inference eight times, without any loss of accuracy on benchmark tests. The method, published on the Google Research blog and set for ICLR 2026, encodes KV caches down to 3 bits while maintaining identical performance to the uncompressed baseline.

While the AI accelerates initial progress, the author still feels the need to chart his own path and anticipates future tools that will combine AI with comprehensive planning.

content: Wars today focus on “chokeholds,” targeting economic, logistical, and digital lifelines to compel adversaries into surrender or negotiate concessions. It reflects a shift from conventional warfare to sustained pressure on critical infrastructure.

title: 刚刚，英伟达革了自己的命：智能体自主进化7天，干掉所有算子工程师、GPU专家
content: NVIDIA’s new study introduces Agentic Variation Operators (AVO), an evolution framework where autonomous agents replace traditional mutation and crossover in genetic search. In a seven‑day, fully automatic run on the Blackwell B200 GPU, an AVO-driven agent optimized multi‑head attention kernels, surpassing expert cuDNN and FlashAttention‑4 by up to 10.5 % in BF16 throughput. The same agent quickly adapted the improvements to grouped‑query attention, boosting performance over cuDNN by 7 %. AVO demonstrates deeper hardware‑level reasoning, suggesting a future for fully automated software optimization.

It handles office tasks (document editing, data analysis, résumé optimization), geek tools (search, QR codes, email, infographic creation), shopping and visual preview (product comparison, photo‑based outfit/gear rendering), and life‑advice agents for skincare, parenting, pets, and travel. It also includes niche modules for I‑Ching and Bible study. The site invites users to test and report stability issues.

> JimuReport 积木报表 AI 智能生成报表深度解析与实战指南 报表开发的效率困境

做过企业级报表的开发者一定深有体会：哪怕是一张看起来 "简单" 的数据报表，从需求确认到最终交付，往往要经历字段梳理、布局设计、样式调整、数据绑定、打印适配等一连串琐碎环节。遇到复杂的分组统计、交叉分析、套打模板，耗时更是成倍增长。一天能做完一张复杂报表，已经算效率不错了。

那么问题来了 —— 有没有一种方式，能让报表开发从 "一天一张" 变成 "一天一百张"？

JimuReport 积木报表最新推出的 AI 智能生成报表能力，正是冲着这个目标来的…
source: 开源中国-全部 - JEECG官方

title: Apifox 供应链投毒，中招后是否需要重装系统？
content: Apifox experienced a supply‑chain injection compromise that distributed malicious scripts through its CDN. The attack unfolded over three phases, with the second phase delivering dynamically loaded malware. While no evidence has emerged that the attackers installed a back‑door, experts recommend reinstalling the affected system because the code may have changed over the more than two‑month attack period. Resetting the computer provides the safest protection against any undetected additional compromises.
华电国际 (SH600027) is approaching a 10‑hour deadline. The message asks if any of the mentioned users feel excitement, anxiety, or restlessness about the upcoming event.

title: Claude Code + OpenSpec 正在加速 AICoding 落地：从模型博弈到工程化的范式转移
content: 通过对 Anthropic 推出的 Claude Code（以下简称 CC）与 Fission AI 倡导的 OpenSpec 进行深度解构可以发现，两者正在通过 "代理化执行" 与 "规格化驱动" 双轮驱动，构建一套闭环的 AI 研发体系。这种结合不仅标志着 AI 编程工具从 IDE 插件向终端原生代理（Agentic Tool）的转变，更预示着 "规格驱动开发"（Spec-Driven Development, SDD）将成为企业级 AICoding 落地的核心范式。

title: 深圳二手房价重返「6 字头」，单日成交量创近5年新高，楼市真的复苏了吗？
content: Since early March, Shenzhen’s second‑hand housing market has intensified. Last week a single day saw the highest daily transaction volume in nearly five years, boosting weekly sales at leased‑store partners by 9.9%, the largest 17‑month weekly jump. The average price for used homes rose to RMB 62,000 per square meter—its first “6‑figure” level in eight months. The data indicate a significant rebound in Shenzhen’s residential market.

content: Claims that AI drives job cuts are trending, but many experts suggest the narrative is often a smokescreen. Companies may use AI explanations to hide slower sales, shifting business focus, or prior over‑recruitment, rather than genuine AI impact.

title: 中国新一代机器狼群巷战画面首次公开，「暗影」「浴血」「极地」协同作战，将如何影响巷战逻辑？
content: China’s Ballistic Automatic Research Ltd. has unveiled its new generation of robotic wolf squads, described as stronger, smarter, and more battlefield‑ready than earlier models. The robots can mount a wider array of weapons, including missiles and grenade launchers, enabling they suppress targets. They are divided into three roles: “Shade” for reconnaissance, “Bloodbath” for offensive strikes, and “Polar” for support. A recent urban street‑combat drill demonstrated the effectiveness of the “Polar,” “Shade,” and “Bloodbath” teams in simulated combat scenarios.

title: 马斯克，要启动史上最大IPO了
content: SpaceX plans to file its IPO this week, targeting a June 2024 U.S. listing that could raise more than $75 billion, potentially the largest ever. The company will offer over 20% of shares to retail investors and may forgo the usual six‑month lock‑up, instead negotiating customized terms to curb post‑listing sell‑offs. With a dual‑class structure, Elon Musk aims to retain control. SpaceX’s revenue will come mainly from Starlink satellite internet, now expanded by merging its AI unit xAI, boosting its valuation to about $1.25 trillion.

title: 张雪峰去世了，但他留下了硬科技“遗产”
content: Former Chinese education entrepreneur Zhang Xuefeng died at 41 after building a personal‑IP‑driven empire that ran 9 companies, served thousands, and generated billions in revenue. He also invested as a limited partner in several hard‑tech funds, indirectly owning shares in multiple IPO firms. Without a will, his assets will pass to his wife and daughter, creating succession challenges. The survival of his firms hinges on transitioning from his individual brand to a sustainable institutional reputation.

title: 两位大佬相继离世，AI时代我们活得太着急了
content: The article notes the recent deaths of two influential figures—teacher Zhang Xuefeng (41) and entrepreneur Leonid Radvinsky (43)—to reflect on how rapidly life can end. It argues that the swift AI-driven tech cycle leaves people racing to learn new tools, causing physical strain and burnout. The writer warns programmers to protect their health, balance work, family, and learning, and reminds readers to slow down and focus on well-being amid relentless progress.

Google released the Lyria 3 series, featuring 3‑minute professional tracks (Pro) and 30‑second clips (Clip). Meituan’s LongCat‑Next, a 68.5B‑parameter multimodal model, and PKU‑ByteDance’s 14B‑parameter Helios video generator were open‑sourced. Google clarified Gemini CLI permissions and expanded Copilot data use policies. Figma opened its canvas to AI agents; Vibe Coding XR turns natural language into WebXR apps in 60 s. Mozilla launched the “cq” Agent sharing standard. Anthropic added workspace tools to Claude mobile, while OpenClaw improved OpenAI API and Slack/Teams support. MiniMax released Office Skills for document generation. Alibaba Cloud lifted JVSClaw’s invitation‑only barrier, adding 5 GB storage. Google’s TurboQuant cut KV cache by sixfold; OpenAI unveiled its Model Spec framework and a safety bug bounty. Intel launched Arc Pro B70/B65 GPUs, and Apple reportedly plans an overhaul of Siri into an independent iOS 27 app.

title: 准备做一个 AI 仓库代码分析工具
content: The proposal adds an AI‑augmented code‑analysis pipeline to a Git repository. When a push or PR occurs, a CI workflow clones the full repo, runs static analysis tools (ESLint, SonarQube, etc.) to produce JSON/SARIF reports, then sends those reports to an LLM API. The AI labels severity, suggests fixes, filters false positives, and generates a Markdown report. Results are posted as PR comments, archived as CI artifacts, optionally emailed or displayed on a dashboard, creating a feedback loop for continuous improvement.

content: OpenAI abruptly shut down its AI video tool Sora on March 24, ending a 25‑month run that had cost about $1.5 million daily. The decision came two weeks after Sora entered a $1 billion Disney partnership. Despite early hype and rapid app downloads, Sora’s high compute costs and limited revenue (≈$210 k) made it unsustainable. The move reflects a shift toward more profitable products and a focus on enterprise services ahead of a potential IPO.

Model status can be checked on the dashboard or at ai.dooo.ng/status, and the site also hosts an image‑storage service.

The article explains why Chinese consumer stocks have lagged since 2022, focusing on the negative “clipping gap” between social financing (社融) and broad money (M2). High M2 indicates loose policy, but weak社融 shows credit contraction and low consumer borrowing. This credit squeeze, coupled with weaker property markets, has reduced household spending and future profit expectations, harming consumer equity valuations. Recovery would require simultaneous credit rebound, stable property sales, and declining consumer deposits, signaling renewed spending confidence.
